spec.name: The Great Chessboard Of Midgaard
spec.description: You stand in the archway of the Chessboard of Midgaard. The giant wooden gate is rusted open. A narrow dirt path leads eastwards into the thick grass and the chessboard opens up to the west.

east.description: A dirt path leads away through the great field north of Midgaard.

west.description: The huge chessboard opens up to the west.
